visual_dna: Are all shapes clearly rounded, chunky, and free of any sharp edges?
Does the material read firmly as soft plastic, matte, or clean glossy ceramic?
Are colors highly saturated, warm, and vibrantly cheerful?
product_logic: Does the core asset pass the 3-second readability rule for mobile screens?
Could the silhouette be quickly identified at UI thumbnail size?
technical_excellence: Is the shading perfectly clean and entirely free from messy noise, grunge, or realistic textures?
Are the color gradients visually smooth and uniform?

forbidden_elements: Actual 2D flat line-art or black cartoon outlines
Sharp edges, razor-thin geometry, or aggressive spikes
Photorealistic grunge, dirt, scratches, or complex noise
Desaturated, grim, dark, or muted color palettes
Complex internal noisy details that fail to read at tiny mobile UI scales
